resposta:
solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def defangIPaddr(self, address: str) -> str:
        return address.replace(".", "[.]")
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution replaces all occurrences of "." with "[.]" in the input string using the `replace()` method. This is a straightforward approach with linear time complexity as it iterates through each character of the string once. The space complexity is also linear due to the creation of a new string.
